calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-27-2012 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-09-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT SREE CONSTRUCTION CO., INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Off calendar at the request of the moving party. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)

Req. For Hearing To Prove-Up Damages As Against Defaulted Deft Moises Avila; Dec And Pos
Off Calendar May-22-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: K. Tsenin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Shannon Paton, Esq. for and with the plaintiff Icenogle Construction Management, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness Maria Icenogle was sworn and direct examined.
Default of Defendant Moises Avila has been duly entered.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Moises Avila as follows:

Damages/Principal - $72,544.00
No fees or costs requestd.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2012 Set For Trial On Sep-10-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2011 Continued To Oct-07-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-05-2011 Sanctions
